paper_title: A Mock Paper Title for Testing

structured_knowledge.content: Mock method A uses a nonparametric prior to quantify uncertainty in procedure selection.
Mock dataset contains 1000 p-values from hypothesis tests on 50 variables.
Mock method declares on average 850 of 1000 p-values significant at alpha=0.05.
Each p-value is assumed super-uniform under the null hypothesis.

identified_assumptions.assumption: P-values are super-uniform under null hypotheses.
The prior supports the full space of valid multiple-testing procedures.
Survey weights correctly represent the target population.

statistical_methods: Mock method A uses a nonparametric prior distribution to model uncertainty.
Monte Carlo sampling approximates the prior predictive distribution.
Survey weights are applied to hypothesis tests for population-representative inference.

data_generation_processes.description: Mock dataset collected via stratified sampling of study participants.
data_generation_processes.sampling: Two-stage stratified sampling with probability-proportional selection.
data_generation_processes.weights: Participant weights adjust for non-response and over-sampling.
data_generation_processes.variables: 50 variables including background, outcomes, and covariates.
data_generation_processes.p_value_generation: 1000 nonparametric hypothesis tests on variable pairs.

reproducibility_gaps: No random seed is specified in the provided code.
No software version information is documented.
Dataset download URL is not provided beyond a general link.
No convergence diagnostics are reported for the MCMC sampler.
